modes.purpose: detailed plan markdown with atomic 2-5min tasks and complete code blocks

modes.default_when: pre-workflow standalone when team requires PRD before feature begins
modes.output: docs/YYYYMMDD_HHMMSS_[PLAN]_<slug>.md (PRD template) and optionally an issue on the tracker

modes.purpose: tracer-bullet vertical slices published to issue tracker
modes.default_when: phase decompose when issue tracker is configured
modes.output: N issues on the tracker (gh / linear / etc.)

human_approval_required_for: split_plan_into_subprojects (when scope check finds the artifact covers multiple subsystems)
